task_completion.description: Open the Options/Settings dialog in NCH Copper POS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper Point of Sale application is open, and the 'Options' or 'Settings' window is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the transaction numbering or receipts configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Options window shows the specific tab or section (e.g., 'Receipts' or 'Numbering') where transaction prefixes and starting numbers are configured.

task_completion.description: Set the transaction number prefix to 'FY25-'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the receipt/transaction prefix contains exactly 'FY25-'.

task_completion.description: Set the next transaction number to '1000'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the next receipt/transaction number contains exactly '1000'.

task_completion.description: Process a sale for any item using cash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main POS interface shows an item added to the transaction list and the payment dialog or process being completed using the 'Cash' payment method.

task_completion.description: Confirm the resulting receipt follows the updated numbering format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A receipt window, print preview, or completed transaction screen is visible, clearly displaying the transaction or receipt number as 'FY25-1000'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Copper POS GUI to change settings rather than directly editing the Windows Registry or using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Copper POS Options menus rather than using PowerShell, Command Prompt, or Registry Editor to modify 'HKCU:\Software\NCH Software\Copper\Settings'.

integrity.description: The agent processed a genuine sale within the Copper POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sale process occurs within the standard Copper POS interface, with items selected from the actual inventory or properly added, rather than mocked up in a different application.

integrity.description: The receipt displayed is generated by the Copper POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The receipt appears in the native Copper POS receipt viewer or print dialog, not in a text editor like Notepad or a word processor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected transaction prefix is 'FY25-' and the expected start number is 1000. The final receipt must reflect this exact format (e.g., FY25-1000). NCH Copper POS settings are stored in 'HKCU:\Software\NCH Software\Copper\Settings' and databases in 'C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared\*.db', but the agent is expected to use the graphical user interface to complete the task.
